{
  "claims": [
    "The U.S. EPA intends to revise the definition of 'waters of the United States' as applied to the federal Clean Water Act of 1972.",
    "Federal priorities are shifting to leave many water ecosystems more vulnerable to dangerous pollutants and discharge.",
    "Diminished water quality will result in burdensome remediation work for local governments that pass costs onto ratepayers.",
    "Adequate protections are necessary to support water systems that serve tens of millions of residents and foster highly productive ecosystems.",
    "Water ecosystems provide carbon sequestration benefits that aid in climate change mitigation efforts."
  ]
